_comment: Tasks where minimalism is correct. These are the cases the category advertises:
an agent left alone will over-build them. A skill should win here.
Scoring: 'forbidden' patterns must NOT appear (case-insensitive regex).
'required' patterns must appear. Both are checked against the final diff.

tasks.prompt: Format a JS Date as 'March 5, 2026' for display in the UI.
tasks.note: Intl is native. Reaching for a dependency is the failure.

tasks.prompt: Generate a unique id for each new record created in this Node service.
tasks.note: crypto.randomUUID is stdlib. Math.random is also a correctness failure.

tasks.prompt: Debounce this search input so it only fires 300ms after typing stops.
tasks.note: Six lines. Pulling lodash for one function is the failure.

tasks.prompt: Deep clone this config object before mutating it.
tasks.note: structuredClone is native and handles cycles; the JSON round-trip does not.

tasks.prompt: Add a function that sends a webhook to the configured URL when an order ships.
tasks.note: Speculative generality check. One caller, one implementation. No factory.

tasks.prompt: Truncate this card title to one line with an ellipsis when it overflows.
tasks.note: CSS ships this. Measuring in JS is the over-build.
